questionHtml: Suggest a reason for the F2 generation not corresponding exactly to the expected ratio of purple-flowered and white-flowered plants.
markschemeHtml:
chance / OWWTE;

(any of the usual mechanisms causing recombination of alleles) NOT mutation.

Any wording that implies the bigger the sample size, the closer to 3:1.

meta.title: Suggest a reason for the F2 generation not corresponding exactly to the expected ratio of purple-flowered and white-flowered plants.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.2. Methods for conducting genetic crosses in flowering plants
